name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Booneville, KY's Farmers State Bank branch at 21 Ky 11 S offers full-service banking to the community.
description_long:
Located at 21 Ky 11 S in Booneville, KY, this Farmers State Bank branch provides in-person banking services to the local community. As a full-service branch, it serves Booneville residents and surrounding areas with retail banking access. Current branch hours are not published online—contact the bank directly or visit during standard banking hours.

This Booneville branch offers standard banking services including account opening, deposits, withdrawals, transfers, and customer service. For specific information about services available at this location, Booneville customers should contact the bank directly or visit the branch in person—no direct phone number is currently listed for this specific branch.

When visiting the Farmers State Bank branch in Booneville, KY, bring a photo ID and any documents relevant to your banking needs. Whether you're opening an account, making a deposit, or accessing other financial services, this community bank branch is ready to assist Booneville's banking customers.
services: Online banking platform with account access and management
pros: Offers online banking platform for remote account access and management
Provides branded FSB credit card product with dedicated online account access
Kentucky-based community bank suggesting local market expertise and personalized service
Full-service banking institution combining traditional and digital banking channels
Maintains check ordering services through established third-party providers
Direct online presence with dedicated website for account management and inquiries
cons: Website provides limited detailed information about account types, fees, interest rates, or specific lending products
Multiple disclaimers indicate some linked services are NOT FDIC-insured, creating confusion about deposit protection coverage
Lacks transparent disclosure of APRs, minimum balances, or account requirements on public-facing website
Regional market focus may limit accessibility for customers outside Kentucky service area
Minimal information available about loan products, credit terms, or competitive advantages versus larger institutions
best_for: Kentucky residents seeking local community banking relationships with online convenience
Customers preferring traditional regional banks over large national financial institutions
Small business owners and individuals needing personalized banking services in Kentucky markets
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best suited for Kentucky-area customers seeking traditional community banking with online access capabilities. The primary caveat is that the public website lacks detailed product specifications, fee schedules, and interest rate information necessary for informed comparison shopping, and unclear FDIC insurance disclaimers warrant direct inquiry before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
